text_candidates.previous_sentence: Our board of directors has oversight of our strategic and business risk management and has delegated cybersecurity risk management oversight to the audit & risk oversight committee of our board of directors (Audit & Risk Oversight Committee).
text_candidates.next_sentence: The privacy & product compliance committee of our board of directors (Privacy & Product Compliance Committee) oversees risks related to privacy and data use, including overseeing compliance with our comprehensive privacy program.

text_candidates.sentence_text: Rosen served in senior leadership, engineering, and operational roles across technology organizations.
text_candidates.previous_sentence: Prior to joining our company, Mr.
text_candidates.next_sentence: Our cybersecurity teams monitor the prevention, detection, mitigation, and remediation of cybersecurity incidents through a variety of technical and operational measures, and regularly report to our CISO.

text_candidates.sentence_text: Our Chief Information Security Officer (CISO), Guy Rosen, leads our cybersecurity program and oversees teams across the company supporting our security functions of identify, prevent, detect, respond, and recover.
text_candidates.previous_sentence: Management is responsible for identifying, assessing, and managing material cybersecurity risks on an ongoing basis, establishing processes to ensure that such potential cybersecurity risk exposures are monitored, putting in place appropriate mitigation measures, maintaining cybersecurity policies and procedures, and providing regular reports to our board of directors, including through the Audit & Risk Oversight Committee and Privacy & Product Compliance Committee.
text_candidates.next_sentence: These teams are comprised of personnel with a broad range of experience across the private and public sectors, the technology industry, and different geographic regions.
